prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild workshop, Ari Mistfell (androgynous crafter, rolled-sleeve apron, ash-marked gloves) holds a pulsing, overheating beast core with iron tongs over an anvil. Ari Starling (feminine healer, cream and mint robes) steps in beside them, hands raised to begin a cooling spell. Cinematic, warm lamplight, high detail, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild workshop shot; Ari Starling gently channels mint-colored magical energy over the glowing beast core while Ari Mistfell carefully steadies the tongs to align the core. The core's intense red light fades to a stable soft blue. Consistent character appearance and camera, no text, no watermark.
